title: cybianthus alpestris
intro: Cybianthus alpestris is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. It is native to the Andean region of South America and is also known as the "Andean Primrose". The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cybianthus alpestris include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, and it is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion for medicinal use.
